notes: Pre-STT era; equity & debt LTCG ~10% without indexation
STT introduced; equity LTCG exempt u/s 10(38)
Debt LTCG period -> 36 months; ~13% effective after indexation
LTCG on equity reintroduced 10% above Rs 1 lakh
Debt funds lose indexation; taxed at slab (top slab assumed)
LTCG raised to 12.5%; exemption raised to Rs 1.25 lakh
